title: [InstCombine] Fold an unsigned comparison of `add nsw X, C` with a constant into a signed comparison

tests.outside_scope_reason: Uses zext from i8 to create provably non-negative values instead of GEP indices or loop induction variables mentioned in summary. Pure arithmetic without any pointer operations.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @test_pure_arithmetic_zext(i8 %x) {
#0:
  %x.ext = zext i8 %x to i32
  %add = add nsw i32 %x.ext, 5
  %cmp = icmp ugt i32 %add, 10
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
define i1 @test_pure_arithmetic_zext(i8 %x) {
#0:
  %cmp = icmp ugt i8 %x, 5
  ret i1 %cmp
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Tests icmp ult predicate transformation instead of icmp ugt specifically mentioned in summary. Summary only discusses ugt conversion but patch handles all unsigned predicates.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @test_ult_predicate(i16 %x) {
#0:
  %x.ext = zext i16 %x to i32
  %add = add nsw i32 %x.ext, 10
  %cmp = icmp ult i32 %add, 100
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
define i1 @test_ult_predicate(i16 %x) {
#0:
  %cmp = icmp ult i16 %x, 90
  ret i1 %cmp
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Value X comes from bitwise and operation creating provably non-negative range, not from loop induction variables or GEP computations described in summary.

alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define i1 @test_masked_and_operation(i32 %x) {
  %masked = and i32 %x, 224
  %cmp = icmp ult i32 %masked, 96
  ret i1 %cmp
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @test_masked_and_operation(i32 %x) {
#0:
  %masked = and i32 %x, 255
  %add = add nsw i32 %masked, 5
  %cmp = icmp ule i32 %add, 100
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
define i1 @test_masked_and_operation(i32 %x) {
#0:
  %masked = and i32 %x, 224
  %cmp = icmp ult i32 %masked, 96
  ret i1 %cmp
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
